## Summary

Adds consent-based support access to the Revise Workbench and builds a full admin support investigation flow:

1. **Revise Workbench Support Access Toggle** — users can grant the support team permission to view their revision queue, diagnostic findings, and decisions (7-day expiry, revocable)
2. **Admin Support View** (`/admin/support`) — lists all evaluations with active support access grants, with drill-down into individual jobs
3. **Admin Support Detail** (`/admin/support/[jobId]`) — shows diagnostic findings (original defective text + diagnosis + severity), revision decisions (accept/reject/defer + selected text), and revision session state
4. **Report a Concern Form** — on both the evaluation report page and Revise Workbench, users can describe issues and attach screenshots (sends to support@revisiongrade.com via Resend)
5. **Expanded Grant Scopes** — `evaluation_telemetry`, `revision_data`, `full` (migration widens the CHECK constraint)

## Scope

**Touches:**
- `app/workbench-v2/page.tsx` — adds SupportAccessToggle + ReportConcernForm
- `app/evaluate/[jobId]/page.tsx` — adds ReportConcernForm alongside existing toggle
- `components/reports/SupportAccessToggle.tsx` — refactored to accept `scope` prop with context-aware copy
- `components/reports/ReportConcernForm.tsx` — new contact form component
- `app/api/jobs/[jobId]/support-access/route.ts` — POST accepts `scope` parameter
- `app/api/contact/route.ts` — new contact form endpoint (Resend)
- `app/api/admin/support/route.ts` — lists active grants (admin-only)
- `app/api/admin/support/[jobId]/route.ts` — returns findings + decisions + sessions (admin-only, requires active grant)
- `app/admin/support/page.tsx` — admin support listing UI
- `app/admin/support/[jobId]/page.tsx` — admin support detail UI
- `app/admin/page.tsx` — adds "User Support View" card
- `lib/support/checkSupportAccess.ts` — scope-aware grant checking
- `supabase/migrations/20260604000000_expand_support_access_scope.sql` — widens scope constraint

**Does NOT touch:** Evaluation pipeline, revision pipeline, manuscript text access, existing admin pages, existing support access toggle on eval page (preserved).

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Migration alters CHECK constraint — safe ALTER on existing table, no data loss
- Contact form email requires `RESEND_API_KEY` env var — graceful fallback (logs to console) when not set
- Admin support view requires both admin role AND active user-granted access — defense in depth
- Screenshot attachments in contact form use blob URLs (client-side only) — actual Supabase storage upload can be added later for server-side persistence

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: Confirmed — no changes to evaluation or revision pipeline logic
